data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. AGENT REMINGTON ran well on debut last start to finish second of 11 over 1100m at this track after racing on the speed into the turn. Racing in a fitter state and now having had racing experience can go one better. 6. DESERT ORA placed third of 11 two runs back after racing on the speed, then missed the frame last time over 1100m at Ascot after getting held up into the straight. Looks a great each-way bet. 8. I'M ALL THE FUNK stormed home from 11th of 14 into the turn to finish second over 1230m at this track. Trained here and rates well as a main contender. 3. NO COMEBACKS resumes from a spell of four months. Could only manage to finish sixth of 12 last start over 1000m at this track. Tuned up with a fourth of nine in a recent trial over 600m at this track and having placed fresh-up here last prep can figure in the finish.","runners":[2,6,8,3],"exclusive":true}
